ns0:entry.ns0:title: BranchMetrics/xamarin-branch-deep-linking-attribution
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BranchMetrics/xamarin-branch-deep-linking-attribution
Language: objective-c
The Branch Xamarin SDK for deep linking and attribution. Branch helps mobile apps grow with deep links / deeplinks that power paid acquisition and re-engagement campaigns, referral programs, content sharing, deep linked emails, smart banners, custom user onboarding, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FLEXTool/FLEX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FLEXTool/FLEX
Language: objective-c
An in-app debugging and exploration tool for iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Hammerspoon/hammerspoon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Hammerspoon/hammerspoon
Language: objective-c
Staggeringly powerful macOS desktop automation with Lua

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
Language: objective-c
A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. Succeeded by https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: geode-sdk/ios-launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geode-sdk/ios-launcher
Language: objective-c
Manages installing and launching Geometry Dash for iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gnachman/iTerm2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gnachman/iTerm2
Language: objective-c
iTerm2 is a terminal emulator for Mac OS X that does amazing things.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: joeldev/JLRoutes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/joeldev/JLRoutes
Language: objective-c
URL routing library for iOS with a simple block-based API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoftconnect/ms-intune-app-sdk-ios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoftconnect/ms-intune-app-sdk-ios
Language: objective-c
Intune App SDK for iOS enables data protection and mobile app management features in iOS mobile apps with Microsoft Intune

ns0:entry.ns0:title: muxinc/mux-stats-sdk-avplayer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/muxinc/mux-stats-sdk-avplayer
Language: objective-c
Mux integration with `AVPlayer` for native iOS, tvOS, and visionOS applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: noah-nuebling/mac-mouse-fix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/noah-nuebling/mac-mouse-fix
Language: objective-c
Mac Mouse Fix - Make Your $10 Mouse Better Than an Apple Trackpad!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/TrollStore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/TrollStore
Language: objective-c
Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple

ns0:entry.ns0:title: parse-community/Parse-SDK-iOS-OSX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/parse-community/Parse-SDK-iOS-OSX
Language: objective-c
The Apple SDK for Parse Platform (iOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roothide/Bootstrap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roothide/Bootstrap
Language: objective-c
A full featured bootstrap for iOS 15.0-17.0 A8-A17Pro & M1+M2 using roothide
